finalAssistantMessages.text: The hub `data/` entry is pre-existing untracked generated output, not the misplaced file, so I’m leaving it alone. I’ll run the queue validator once now; if it checks the whole queue and reports unrelated missing batches, I’ll separate that from this batch’s JSON parse check.

The full generated validator currently stops on a different missing batch (`image-description-agent-1-wave-5.json`), so it can’t give a whole-queue pass yet. I’m doing one last targeted comparison against this batch’s five IDs to verify this result file matches exactly.
